event.name: PSG Fan Token Governance Vote — Stadium Naming Rights Proposal (August 2027)

context.pre_match_notes: PSG governance vote on stadium naming rights partnership. High-profile vote — expected high participation. Token in Phase 3 (Active Commercial). PSG Tier 1 commercial partner. Vote outcome affects token utility perception. Macro: neutral. TVL: MODERATE.

question: Should a holder ENTER, WAIT, or ABSTAIN ahead of this governance vote? What is the signal direction?

verified_outcome.detail: High participation governance vote in Phase 3 token = utility signal. Price +8% in 48h post-vote announcement.
